channel.title: GitHub Starlark Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Starlark in GitHub

item.title: googleapis/googleapis
item.description: Public interface definitions of Google APIs.

item.title: GoogleContainerTools/distroless
item.description: 🥑 Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

item.title: bazelbuild/bazel-central-registry
item.description: The central registry of Bazel modules for the Bzlmod external dependency system.

item.title: google/cel-spec
item.description: Common Expression Language -- specification and binary representation

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_nodejs
item.description: NodeJS toolchain for Bazel.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_appengine
item.description: AppEngine rules for Bazel

item.title: cncf/xds
item.description: xDS API Working Group

item.title: ash2k/bazel-tools
item.description: Reusable bits for Bazel

item.title: openconfig/gnoi
item.description: gRPC Network Operations Interface (gNOI) defines a set of gRPC-based microservices for executing operational commands on network devices.

item.title: googleapis/api-common-protos
item.description: A standard library for use in specifying protocol buffer APIs.

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_python
item.description: Bazel Python Rules

item.title: google/bazel-common
item.description: Common functionality for Google's open-source libraries that are built with bazel.

item.title: ethpandaops/ethereum-package
item.description: A Kurtosis package that deploys a private, portable, and modular Ethereum devnet

item.title: aspect-build/rules_js
item.description: High-performance Bazel rules for running Node.js tools and building JavaScript projects

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_pkg
item.description: Bazel rules for creating packages of many types (zip, tar, deb, rpm, ...)

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_rust
item.description: Rust rules for Bazel

item.title: rules-proto-grpc/rules_proto_grpc
item.description: Bazel rules for building Protobuf and gRPC code and libraries from proto_library targets

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_jvm_external
item.description: Bazel rules to resolve, fetch and export Maven artifacts

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_cc
item.description: C++ Rules for Bazel

item.title: bazelbuild/examples
item.description: Examples for Bazel
